description_long: This is a classic steam locomotive with a cylindrical black boiler, red wheels, and gold and brass detailing along the body. The front features a prominent red cowcatcher, a smokestack, and a headlamp, while the cab at the rear is covered with a wooden roof and labeled 'LEVIATHAN'. The locomotive has a series of pipes, domes, and a bell on top, with visible connecting rods and mechanical components along the wheels. The cab has windows and an open rear, suggesting space for an operator. The overall design is ornate, with a mix of metallic and wooden textures, and the train appears to be a single engine unit without additional carriages. The vibrant color scheme and detailed construction evoke a historical or vintage urban rail setting.
description: A vintage steam locomotive with a black and gold body, red wheels, and a wooden-roofed cab labeled 'LEVIATHAN'. Features include a red cowcatcher, smokestack, and ornate metallic detailing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the locomotive, red wheels, gold and black boiler, and the 'LEVIATHAN' cab.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wooden roof of the cab and the open back, with minimal detail of the train's front.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the wheels, boiler, and cab, but from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the red cowcatcher, headlamp, smokestack, and the symmetrical arrangement of the front components.
attribute_door_placement: doors at the rear cab only
attribute_window_arrangement: spaced rectangular windows on the cab
